title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif and Simon Eskildsen discuss scaling infrastructure at scale, infrastructure team evolution, why new database companies emerge regularly, and the future of databases and AI coding agents. The conversation covers engineering principles, hiring practices, and what separates elite infrastructure engineers.
